violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — ---Deli express and other items are not date marked from thaw date. -Hot hold items (stated as held for 2-3 hours) are not time stamped.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Raw wood used below 3 compartment sink.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. -Tongs, pizza cutter and other utensils stated as washed daily.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue/debris at ice chute of soda machine. -Carbon/debris at interior of ovens.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Tong holder at roller grill has residue at bottom interior surfaces. -Chest freezer in dish room has some frost build up. -Chest freezer in back room has frost build up at interior sides.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Trays near roller grill and air fryer are not inverted. -Coffee cup lids are stored on cloth at coffee station. -Stir straws are below paper towel dispenser.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. -Bathroom doors do not self close.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -Spray bottle with yellow chemical is unlabeled.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. -Sani Bucket made to greater than 100ppm chlorine and soap solution.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket found with 0ppm Chlorine and bubbles.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — ---Deli Express items in Grab n go refrigeration unit are not date marked.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Corn dogs and hot dogs in refrigerator are not date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Interior edges of pizza ovens and fryer tray have foods residue/debris. -Frost build up in upright freezer. -Some frost at interior surfaces of chest freezer.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Drainboard/rack/table space was insufficient to accommodate equipment/utensils. -Some dishes draining on cloth at drain board.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Items were stacked on and in front of hand sink basin. Had to move both stacks to wash hands.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust build up at fans and high surfaces in back storage/dish pit room.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles are moved out of place and several are stained/damaged in storage/dish pit room.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
